title: Todo UI with Atomic Design and styled-components
description: Build the todo experience using Atomic Design folders (atoms, molecules, organisms), styled-components with a typed DefaultTheme and centralized tokens, and App Router pages that compose organisms while surfacing visible loading and error states for all mutations and loads, calling server actions only from appropriate client/server boundaries.
acceptance: UI is organized under components/ui with atoms, molecules, and organisms following single-responsibility components.
styled-components theming uses typed DefaultTheme and shared tokens; SSR/registry setup matches the installed library version for correct hydration on Windows.
Users can create, list, update text, toggle complete, and delete todos with loading indicators and clear error banners or inline messages during failures.
Pages/templates compose organisms and do not embed low-level atoms directly in ways that break Atomic Design guidance from the brief.
Client code does not import SQLite drivers or read server-only secrets.
